Table of contents

Sec. 12.22.1 Accessory Dwelling Units

Accessory dwelling units and junior accessory dwelling units shall be permitted in all residential zones in accordance with state law. A detached accessory dwelling unit shall not exceed the height limit established by the underlying zone, and the side and rear yard setback for an accessory dwelling unit shall be no more than four feet. Owner occupancy shall not be required for an accessory dwelling unit. No additional parking shall be required where the accessory dwelling unit is located within one-half mile walking distance of public transit.

A junior accessory dwelling unit contained within the walls of an existing or proposed single-family dwelling shall be permitted on any lot zoned for single-family use, subject to the standards of this section and applicable provisions of the California Government Code.
